title: Wrapped Text not available in sub items > missing feature or bug?
excerpt:

posts.author: TFaust (Timo Faust)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have seen the new feature of wrapped text being added to text / long text fields and I do highly appreciate that!
For reference: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001150345-The-Text-Column

Sadly, this feauture is only available on the item level, but not available on the sub- item level.

Are there plans to roll the feature out so it can be used in sub- items, too or is the limited availability a current bug / oversight?

To showcase: This is an example board before wrapping gets applied:

no text wrapping832×274 28.7 KB

This is the sample board AFTER wrapping is applied to the text field:

no sub text wrapping814×505 58.8 KB

As you can see the text wrapping works wonderfully on the Item and text fields, but sadly not on any of the sub- item fields as there is no option there and it does not take over the higher level setting on text wrapping.

Looking forward if this issue is being worked on.

Have a great day,
Timo

posts.author: jhonnmick (Jhonn Mick)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Timo, thanks for highlighting this — currently, the text wrapping feature applies only to item-level text fields and not to subitems, which appears to be a platform limitation rather than a bug. I’d recommend submitting this as a feature request via the monday.com Community Forum so it can be prioritized in future updates. In the meantime, a temporary workaround is to avoid long strings in subitems or restructure the board to use item-level fields where wrapping is needed. For clarity on upcoming updates, you might also contact support directly.
